case_title: GIAVARA, JASON et al VS S & V PROPERTY C/O STANKO & CAROLYN VRANJES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GIAVARA, JASON PEZZIMENTI, LUKE AGOSTINI, JADA AS TO DEFENDANT S & V PROPERTY C/O STANKO & CAROLYN VRANJES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-20-1999 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT S & V PROPERTY C/O STANKO & CAROLYN VRANJES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GIAVARA, JASON PEZZIMENTI, LUKE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT S & V PROPERTY C/O STANKO & CAROLYN VRANJES $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $165.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,165.00, PLAINTIFF AGOSTINI'S ACTION IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
